subject: [SO] Config Changes for SO to listen to a new DMaap Topic
commit_message:
[SO] Config Changes for SO to listen to a new DMaap Topic

- PNF Addition use case.
- To listen PNF DMaap topics added new Topic PNF_UPDATE

Issue-ID: OOM-3092
Change-ID:I73f97f986a817d423f92f8d92509d0947b8a2503
Signed-off-by: sreeja gattagouni <sg00744975@techmahindra.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Azure 3: Chained-CI build started (pipeline id: 757273653), max time: 24400 seconds

Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/6251/ : FAILURE

The line in commit is too long: it has a size of 111 instead of 80 characters maximum.

Line in cause: -Currently SO supports PNF_READY topic, For Add PNF use case the new topic has added which is PNF_UPDATE topic. ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/6251/ )

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/6251/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-commit-lint/6251
